parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  customer_id: $json.customer_id,
  channel: $json.channel,
  locale: $json.locale,
  message: $json.message,
  intent: $json.intent,
  confidence: $json.confidence,
  escalation_needed: $json.escalation_needed,
  response_text: $json.response_text,
  knowledge_links: $json.knowledge_links,
  received_at: $json.received_at,
  processed_at: $json.processed_at
} }}

parameters.responseBody:
={{ {
  ok: true,
  provider: $json.provider_name,
  customer_id: $json.customer_id,
  intent: $json.intent,
  confidence: $json.confidence,
  escalation_needed: $json.escalation_needed,
  response: $json.response_text,
  references: $json.knowledge_links,
  support_email: $json.support_email
} }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { eventType: 'workflow_execution', status: 'completed', workflowName: 'Healthcare Customer Support Chat Assistant', message: 'Customer support workflow handled a chat request', customerId: $json.customer_id || '', intent: $json.intent || '', processedAt: $json.processed_at || $now } }}
